title: frontend: SimpleTable: Fix stale defaultRowsPerPage after settings change
author: ayushmaan-16

findings.description: URL param key reconstructed manually as prefix.perPage — verify this matches useURLState's internal key composition to avoid a missed URL-param check.
useMemo with empty deps (stale initializer anti-pattern) removed; direct computation makes defaultRowsPerPage reactive.
useEffect syncs rowsPerPage only when URL param is absent — avoids overriding explicit URL state.
